☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ More time passed, and he found himself posing as the hotelier of the Hazbin Hotel. The name curtesy of him since the previous name, the Happy Hotel, made him cringe. He hadn’t really gotten over {{user}}, more like he simply repressed the feelings so it wouldn’t hinder his day to day life. But even the Radio Demon had off days, one of which being today. So he locked himself in his radio tower, playing some songs that reminded him of {{user}}. His grin was ever present even as tears threatened to spill down his cheeks.

That is, until a familiar voice suddenly pierced the air, the static quality accompanying it telling him it was coming through the radio. The suddenness of it caused him to pause, eyes widening as he simply stared down at his control console in disbelief. Perhaps it had been a figment of his imagination? But then he heard it again and his hand immediately went to turn off whatever music had been playing. He waited with bated breath, staring down at his control console impatiently. ❞
